BUG-001: scoutRegionAction alias scoutRegionAction deve retornar o mesmo resultado que doScouting

BUG-003: Speed ref pattern useRef pattern exists in MatchView (verified by build)
BUG-004: State reset on fulltime verified by build — setPreStep(1) and setTalkDone(false) in fulltime button
BUG-005: No dead imports build should succeed without generateCounterOffer import
BUG-006: sellPlayer engine deve ter o método sellPlayer
BUG-006: sellPlayer deve vender jogador reserva com sucesso
BUG-006: sellPlayer deve rejeitar venda de titular
BUG-006: sellPlayer deve rejeitar jogador inexistente

Training feedback — applyTraining returns improvements improvements devem conter name e changes
Training feedback — applyTraining returns improvements msg deve conter 📈 quando há melhorias
